infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Nappr needs your location to track your commute and wake you up.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Nappr requires background tracking to trigger your alarm even when your phone is locked in your pocket.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Nappr to read your location in the background so the alarm can wake you up even when your phone is asleep.
